zh.Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾格倫加利
zh.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry是Reginald or Ranald MacDonald Progenitor of Clan MacDonell of Glengarry和Miss Stewart of Atholl的兒子，於1386年出生在蘇格蘭。他於1400年之前與Miss Fraser of Lovat在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1420年享年34歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry是Reginald or Ranald MacDonald Progenitor of Clan MacDonell of Glengarry和Miss Stewart of Atholl的儿子，于1386年出生在苏格兰。他于1400年之前与Miss Fraser of Lovat在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1420年享年34岁，埋葬在苏格兰音巴內-爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Donald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Domhnall . The final -d of the Anglicized form derives partly from misinterpretation by English speakers of the Gaelic pronunciation, and partly from association with Germanic-origin names such as Ronald . This name is strongly associated with clan Macdonald, the clan of the medieval Lords of the Isles, but is now also widely used by families with no Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry was born in 1386, in Scotland as the son of Reginald or Ranald MacDonald Progenitor of Clan MacDonell of Glengarry and Miss Stewart of Atholl. He married Miss Fraser of Lovat before 1400, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1420, at the age of 34, and was buried in Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry est né en 1386, à Écosse, fils de Reginald or Ranald MacDonald Progenitor of Clan MacDonell of Glengarry et Miss Stewart of Atholl. Il a épousé Miss Fraser of Lovat avant 1400, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1420, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry wurde 1386 in Scotland, als Sohn von Reginald or Ranald MacDonald Progenitor of Clan MacDonell of Glengarry und Miss Stewart of Atholl geboren. Er hat vor 1400 in Europa Miss Fraser of Lovat geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1420 im Alter von 34 Jahren und wurde in Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry è nato il nel 1386 nel Scotland come figlio di Reginald or Ranald MacDonald Progenitor of Clan MacDonell of Glengarry e Miss Stewart of Atholl. Lui sposato Miss Fraser of Lovat prima del 1400, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1420, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarryは1386年にスコットランドでReginald or Ranald MacDonald Progenitor of Clan MacDonell of GlengarryとMiss Stewart of Athollの息子として生まれた。1400年以前にヨーロッパでMiss Fraser of Lovatと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1420年に34歳で死去し，スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry(은)는 1386년 스컷랜드에서 Reginald or Ranald MacDonald Progenitor of Clan MacDonell of Glengarry(와)과 Miss Stewart of Atholl의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1400년 이전 우럽에서 Miss Fraser of Lovat(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1420년 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland: Glengarry, Siorrachd Inbhir Nis, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry nasceu em 1386, em Scotland filho de Reginald or Ranald MacDonald Progenitor of Clan MacDonell of Glengarry e Miss Stewart of Atholl. Ele casou-se com Miss Fraser of Lovat antes 1400, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1420, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry родился в 1386 г. в местности Шотландия. Его родителей звали Reginald or Ranald MacDonald Progenitor of Clan MacDonell of Glengarry и Miss Stewart of Atholl. Он женился на женщине по имени Miss Fraser of Lovat перед 1400 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1420 г. в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry nació en 1386, en Scotland como hijo de Reginald or Ranald MacDonald Progenitor of Clan MacDonell of Glengarry y Miss Stewart of Atholl. Se casó con Miss Fraser of Lovat antes de 1400, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1420, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Inverness-shire, Scotland.
